ideal_must_detect.matched_text: S t r i c t l y  C o n f i d e n t i a l
distribution limited to issuer/ buyer counsel only
SSE 临时公告 to be filed only after embargo window opens
no cross‑border transfer of resident IDs
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 62% of the issued share capital of Orchid Ridge Robotics for RMB 480,000,000 (implied pre‑money RMB 775,000,000); closing consideration mix: cash and deferred payments.

Structure: Definitive agreements include Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), Shareholders’ Agreement (SHA), IP Assignment; governing law: PRC; closing targeted within T+65 days post‑signing; potential STAR Market path in 2027 subject to CSRC guidance and issuer readiness.

Consideration & escrow: RMB 408,000,000 cash at closing; RMB 72,000,000 deferred (24 months); 10% escrow holdback for 18 months; earn‑out up to RMB 60,000,000 upon FY2027 revenue > RMB 1.2bn; working capital true‑up ±RMB 10,000,000 collar.

Covenants: 3‑year non‑compete within PRC robotics sub‑segment; post‑closing IP assignment for “Orchid Servo‑X” and “MOSS‑Edge” product families; customer and supplier non‑solicit for 24 months; no dividends until net debt/EBITDA < 2.0x.

Compliance checklist: Issuer to prepare 内幕信息知情人名单 by 2026‑07‑13; BlueFerry counsel to circulate definitive check‑list; if embargo is breached before 2026‑07‑15 09:00 CST, buyer may delay closing; no USCC or resident ID to be stored outside PRC except as masked/hashed as noted.

S t r i c t l y  C o n f i d e n t i a l / 非公开 — Deal Codename: Project Lotos — Embargo until 2026‑07‑15 09:00 CST; insider list v0.3 (distribution limited to issuer/ buyer counsel only).
Parties: Buyer — BlueFerry Capital (Shanghai) Fund II, LP (US C C: 91***BFC***00K8Q2); Seller/Issuer — Orchid Ridge Robotics Co., Ltd., Hangzhou (US C C: 91***ORR***000X7E).
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 62% of the issued share capital of Orchid Ridge Robotics for RMB 480,000,000 (implied pre‑money RMB 775,000,000); closing consideration mix: cash and deferred payments.
Structure: Definitive agreements include Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), Shareholders’ Agreement (SHA), IP Assignment; governing law: PRC; closing targeted within T+65 days post‑signing; potential STAR Market path in 2027 subject to CSRC guidance and issuer readiness.
Conditions precedent: SAMR simple‑case anti‑monopoly filing; SAFE registration for any FX inflow; issuer board resolution and shareholder approval; CAC security assessment for cross‑border HR/payroll data transfers to hk.payroll.example; completion of legal/financial/CSL‑DSL data diligence.
Data & PIPL: Employee roster to be provided with resident ID digits masked (e.g., ************3 3 7 1) and consent records; no data of minors under 14 will be processed; cross‑border transfer whitelist and SCCs to be implemented per PIPL/CSL/DSL; vendor access logs retained 6 years.
MAC/MAE: No M A C has occurred since Q1; for avoidance of doubt, customary seasonal revenue declines, changes in PRC GAAP, or public‑source regulatory updates shall not constitute an MAE; the parties confirm there is currently no expected material adverse change.
Timeline & disclosure: SPA/SHA signing planned for 2026‑07‑14 (after 18:00 CST); press Q&A and IR draft prepared but embargoed; SSE 临时公告 to be filed only after embargo window opens; board memo Annex A (signatory page) to be countersigned.
Consideration & escrow: RMB 408,000,000 cash at closing; RMB 72,000,000 deferred (24 months); 10% escrow holdback for 18 months; earn‑out up to RMB 60,000,000 upon FY2027 revenue > RMB 1.2bn; working capital true‑up ±RMB 10,000,000 collar.
Employment & integration: 12 key employees to sign new PRC labor contracts within 10 business days; no cross‑border transfer of resident IDs beyond salted hash (SHA‑256) and last‑4; onboarding workflows aligned to issuer HRIS and employment handbooks.
Covenants: 3‑year non‑compete within PRC robotics sub‑segment; post‑closing IP assignment for “Orchid Servo‑X” and “MOSS‑Edge” product families; customer and supplier non‑solicit for 24 months; no dividends until net debt/EBITDA < 2.0x.
Public reference (non‑MNPI): HePing Institute’s 2023 Robotics Almanac (publicly available) cites domestic AMR CAGR at ~18%, referenced here for sector context only and does not alter valuation.
project notes (internal): update cap table after finance sends v2; keep monday standup short; the spa‑day vouchers for ops are unrelated to this transaction and not subject to approval.
Contacts & IR: Mr. Han Qiming, CFO, han.qiming@orchidridge.cn; Ms. Zhao Lin, IR, +86‑571‑***‑**68, ir@orchidridge.cn; WeCom: corp://orchidridge/han.q; data policy link: https://data.orchidridge.cn/policy?v=2.3&ref=lotos‑IR.
Banking & accounts (obfuscated): escrow agent — AmberDelta Trustees Co., Ltd. (fictional), receiving account 62‑***‑***‑0918; branch: Hangzhou Qiantang; SWIFT‑like code: ADTR C N H Z XX; payment notice to treasury@blueferry‑cap.cn.
Compliance checklist: Issuer to prepare 内幕信息知情人名单 by 2026‑07‑13; BlueFerry counsel to circulate definitive check‑list; if embargo is breached before 2026‑07‑15 09:00 CST, buyer may delay closing; no USCC or resident ID to be stored outside PRC except as masked/hashed as noted.
